name: Diffusers Pipeline Integration
trigger: diffusers, pipeline, LTX-Video, StableDiffusion, video generation, UNet, DiT
approach: Inject custom kernels into diffusers pipelines via module-patching closures. Walk model.named_modules() to find target module types (e.g., RMSNorm, LayerNorm, GEGLU). Replace module.forward with a closure that captures the module's parameters and calls the custom kernel. Inject BEFORE CPU offloading. Custom kernels and torch.compile are mutually exclusive unless registered as custom ops.

evidence.strategy: Investigate deep integration with hardware-native operations and architecture-specific instructions.
Refine block sizes and tilt parameters with additional autotuning configurations for better speedup.

pitfalls: Use type(module).__name__ not isinstance() — diffusers RMSNorm is NOT torch.nn.RMSNorm
RMSNorm weight may be None (e.g., LTX-Video uses elementwise_affine=False)
Must inject kernels BEFORE enable_model_cpu_offload() — offloading moves params to CPU
torch.compile and custom kernels are mutually exclusive unless you register as torch custom op
Closure must capture module reference, not just weight tensor, to handle device movement
